channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Zimbabwe restores power after national grid collapse
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Zimbabwe has restored electricity to most of the country after a nationwide blackout. Learn how Zimbabwe power was restored following the grid collapse.
Read More: https://punchng.com/zimbabwe-restores-power-after-national-grid-collapse/

item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Abia State launches Nigeria’s first Manufacturing Technology University Innovation Pod (Manu-Tech UniPod), a landmark project set to boost innovation and j
Read More: https://punchng.com/abia-gets-nigerias-first-university-innovation-hub-for-manufacturing/

item.title: 'It was pretty shocking' - Norris, McLaren detail scale of gap to rivals
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Lando Norris says McLaren have "a hell of a lot to improve" after "pretty shocking" pace in the British Grand Prix despite finishing a solid fourth.

item.title: ADC dismisses dissolution of Kano executives
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The ADC Kano State chapter dismisses reports of its executive committee’s dissolution, calling the claims false and unconstitutional. Learn more about the
Read More: https://punchng.com/adc-dismisses-dissolution-of-kano-executives/

item.title: 'Overturn this': Belgium troll U.S. after dominant...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Belgium defeated the USMNT 4-1 in the 2026 World Cup round-of-16 match Monday night -- and poked fun at the U.S. afterward.

item.title: Poch mum on U.S. future; tells fans to keep faith
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Mauricio Pochettino would not offer an indication about whether he wants to remain as coach of the United States men's national team following the Americans' exit from the World Cup here on Monday.

item.title: Scaloni: 'No truly dominant team' at World Cup
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni said the 2026 World Cup is presenting a strong challenge for the tournament favorites, who are struggling to overcome lower-ranked opponents

item.title: USMNT's World Cup dream crushed by Belgium
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Even with Folarin Balogun back up front, the United States men's national team crashed out of the World Cup in the round of 16 again.

item.title: Pulisic forced off injured for USMNT vs. Belgium
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Christian Pulisic was forced off with an ankle injury in the second half of the United States' World Cup round of 16 loss against Belgium.

item.title: Ronaldo exits in tears as Spain end final World Cu...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: An emotional Cristiano Ronaldo said he had a "clear conscience" as he exited his final World Cup as Portugal were eliminated 1-0 by Spain in the round of 16 in Arlington, Texas, on Monday.

item.title: Martinez steps down, says Portugal 'didn't fail'
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Roberto Martinez confirmed that he is leaving his job as Portugal coach after Monday's 1-0 World Cup round-of-16 defeat to Spain, while denying that the result was "a failure."

item.title: MVP Rodri shines, seeks more from Spain in QFs
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Spain midfielder Rodri was named the best player in his team's 1-0 victory over Portugal but warned they still have "room for improvement" ahead of the World Cup quarterfinals

item.title: Mbappé: Paraguay senator remarks spread racism
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: France star Kylian Mbappé on Monday spoke out against racist comments made by a Paraguay senator.

item.title: 🏆2026-27 UCL season begins mid-World Cup
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The new Champions League campaign begins 38 days after last season's final. Plenty of unheralded clubs are involved, all with their own fascinating stories.

item.title: Belgium handed U.S. a World Cup reality check -- a...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The World Cup dream for the U.S. went up in smoke Monday, comprehensively dismantled 4-1 by Belgium.

item.title: Who's to blame for USMNT's World Cup exit? Rating ...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: This USMNT was supposed to be special, but terrible performances throughout the U.S. roster led to a bitter World Cup exit in the round of 16.

item.description:

item.title: SpaceX’s two lead underwriters have a $1 trillion chasm in their valuation as quiet period ends
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The two lead underwriters on SpaceX’s initial public offering, Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, have a valuation gap of more than $1 trillion as they both initiated coverage at buy.

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Niger State government has imposed a curfew on some communities in Rafi Local Government Area following renewed communal clashes that claimed lives and property. The post Niger imposes curfew on communities over communal clashes appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo said that he won't rush into a decision about his future following Portugal's exit to Spain in his last World Cup match on Monday. The post Ronaldo says ‘won’t make rash decisions’ following last World Cup game appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Nigerian journalist Ugagbe released after days in police detention
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Nigeria Committee of the International Press Institute (IPI Nigeria) has secured the release of journalist, Stanley Ugagbe, a reporter with Secret Reporters, after days in police custody following his arrest by security operatives in Abuja. In a statement issued on Monday, IPI Nigeria said Ugagb

item.title: ADC chieftain bags N100m fine as party returns to court over deregistration battle
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The development comes as the ADC faces another major test at the Court of Appeal, where it is seeking to overturn the Federal High Court judgment that ordered INEC to deregister it and four other parties.

item.title: Customs Set N11.074tn Revenue Target For 2026
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Nigeria Customs Service (NCS) has set an ambitious revenue target of N11.074 trillion for the 2026 fiscal year, almost doubling its 2025 target of N6.584 trillion and building on a performance that exceeded expectations by N674 billion. The comptroller general of Customs, Bashir Adewale Adeniyi,

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: GUNMEN have launched another coordinated murderous attack in three communities in Riyom and Barakin Local Government areas of Plateau State, killing six people and injuring many more. The post Again, gunmen kill six, injure many in Plateau appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: IN Ilorin, Kwara State capital, a total of 15 persons, all males, reportedly lost their lives in an auto crash at the Muslim cemetery, along Ogbomoso-Oko Olowo route on Ilorin-Jebba expressway. The post 32 killed in Kwara, Ogun, Kogi road crashes appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.description: The Federal Government has reaffirmed its commitment to strengthening Nigeria's higher education system through the National University Advancement Programme (NUAP), describing the initiative as a key strategy for building financially sustainable, globally competitive and future-ready universities.

item.title: APM dismisses Oyo APC reconciliation committee, predicts failure ahead of 2027
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: THE Oyo State chapter of the Allied Peoples Movement (APM) has dismissed the reconciliation committee recently inaugurated by the All Progressives Congress (APC), describing the initiative as an exercise that will not resolve the opposition party’s internal challenges ahead of the 2027 general elect

item.title: Burna Boy makes history with 50 million Spotify listeners
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The achievement was primarily driven by his World Cup song with Shakira, ‘Dai Dai,’ which has topped the Spotify Global Top Songs chart for days.

item.title: Egypt: Refugees, Asylum Seekers Arrested, Deported
item.dc:creator: AllAfrica
item.description: [HRW] Amend New Asylum Law in Line with International Standards

item.title: NATO’s Turkiye summit live: Trump, leaders to meet in Ankara
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Defence spending and support for Ukraine's military needs are expected to top the agenda of summit in Turkish capital.

item.title: 27 caps, 11 goals, six tournaments: Ronaldo’s World Cup career by numbers
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Explore Cristiano Ronaldo’s illustrious World Cup career by the numbers. Discover his 27 caps, 11 goals, and six tournaments in this detailed breakdown.
Read More: https://punchng.com/27-caps-11-goals-six-tournaments-ronaldos-world-cup-career-by-numbers/

item.title: Appeal Court to hear suit against deregistration of ADC, Accord Party, three others today
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: THE Court of Appeal, Abuja division will, today hear an appeal challenging the deregistration of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Accord Party and three other political parties. The post Appeal Court to hear suit against deregistration of ADC, Accord Party, three others today appeared first on

item.title: Is the NYSC Reform Another Uniform Makeover?
item.dc:creator: TechEconomy
item.description: | By: Elvis Eromosele In a country where “national service” has too often translated into national sacrifice, the Federal Government has rolled out what it calls the most comprehensive overhaul of the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) in its 53-year history. Approved by the Federal Executive

item.title: Six reasons OPay’s new security features give Nigerians greater peace of mind
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: As digital payments become part of everyday life, keeping money safe has never been more important. To help customers stay protected, OPay introduced two new security features: Emergency Lock and Safety PIN. These features are designed to help users take immediate action when they sense danger, ther

item.title: ‘Fake Agency’: Gbajabiamila threatens Adeyemi with N10bn suit over murder, bribery claims
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Chief of Staff Femi Gbajabiamila threatens N10bn defamation suit against Prince Adeniyi Adeyemi over murder and bribery allegations. Get the full details.
Read More: https://punchng.com/fake-agency-gbajabiamila-threatens-adeyemi-with-n10bn-suit-over-murder-bribery-claims/

item.title: Sokoto: 2023 PDP guber candidate defects to APC, gives reasons

item.description: Ubandoma, a former Commissioner for Finance and Secretary to the Sokoto State Government under the administration of former Governor Aminu Waziri Tambuwal, was... The post Sokoto: 2023 PDP guber candidate defects to APC, gives reasons appeared first on Tribune Online.
